playbook.intent: An alert fires in production. On-call engineer triages within minutes using AI-classified context, decides: noise / known / new incident. New incidents enter a runbook flow; known issues get cross-linked. Outcome: every alert closes with a verdict + audit log.
playbook.scope: An alert fires in production. On-call engineer triages within minutes using AI-classified context, decides: noise / known / new incident. New incidents enter a runbook flow; known issues get cross-linked. Outcome: every alert closes with a verdict + audit log.

success-criteria.criterion: All 4 stages have written outputs in the project record
Each stage's decision gate was answered before advancing (yes / no in writing)
Final stage produced the required written decision artifact
Every methodology reference loaded cleanly via `faion get-content`

stage.name: Receive & Acknowledge

tasks.task: On-call ack within the SLA (e.g., 5 minutes)
Page secondary if scope is unclear

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when incident channel is live and ack is on the clock.

stage.name: Diagnose
stage.intent: Bound the blast radius before fixing.

tasks.task: Pull dashboards (errors, latency, saturation, deploy log)
Hypothesize root cause; test cheapest hypothesis first
Decide: hotfix, rollback, or feature-flag off

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when the fix path is chosen with evidence.

stage.name: Mitigate

tasks.task: Execute the chosen mitigation (rollback / flag / hotfix)
Verify error and latency dashboards recover

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when dashboards are green for 15 consecutive minutes.

stage.name: Postmortem

tasks.task: Document timeline, root cause, contributing factors
Define action items with owners and dates
Share postmortem to engineering at large

stage.decision-gate: Required output: a published blameless postmortem.
